ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2004 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2004 Continued To Jul-06-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-18-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on for Default Prove Up
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Appearances:
Anthony Lee Head, Esq. For Plaintiff Fund Recovery Services, Inc., the Credit Manager Ross Hawkins also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Fund Recovery Services, Inc. and against the defendant CT Screening International LLC as follows
Damages of $63,144.48
Interest of: $15,768.48
Costs of $282.30
For the total of $79,195.26
Judgment signed in open court.
